heading: Exemption of minimum quantities
label: 594 Exemption of minimum quantities
text: The Secretary may, by regulation, exempt from compliance with the provisions of this chapter (1) any variety or varieties of grapes and plums, and (2) the shipment of such minimum quantities of grapes and plums to any foreign country as he may prescribe.
notes: Amendments1961— added cl. (1) and designated existing provisions as cl. (2).Pub. L. 87–105
amendments: Amendments1961— added cl. (1) and designated existing provisions as cl. (2).Pub. L. 87–105
